title: calamagrostis corsica
intro: Calamagrostis corsica, also known as Corsican meadow grass, is a species of grass native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Calamagrostis corsica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system. The plant is traditionally prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications such as creams and salves.
